basic_details.job_title: ECHS Jammu Medical & Non Medical Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 DEO, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Jammu
basic_details.post_name: Medical Specialist, Gynaecologist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Dental A/T/H, Lab Technician, Physiotherapist, Pharmacist, Peon, Driver, Female Attendant, Safaiwala, IT Networking Technician, Data Entry Operator, Clerk
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (application to be dropped in sealed Tender Box at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate)
basic_details.short_information: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has released an employment notice through Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Jammu for engaging Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical staff on a contractual basis at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu. The ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026 covers 15 categories of posts, including Medical Specialist, Gynaecologist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Physiotherapist, Lab Technician, IT Networking Technician, Clerk, Driver, and more. Eligible candidates, with preference given to Ex-servicemen, can apply through

important_dates.raw: Last date to submit application: 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs). Applications received after this date and time will not be accepted. Interview dates: 20, 21 and 22 August 2026 at Station HQ Jammu, starting at 0830 hrs. Reporting time for interview: Candidates must reach between 0845 hrs and 1400 hrs on their scheduled day.

qualification.details: Candidates must meet the minimum qualification and work experience requirements specified for each post. The maximum age for engagement is subject to performance of the candidate, as mentioned in the official notice. Preference will be given to Ex-servicemen. | Minimum work experience ranges from 2 years to 5 years depending on the post, as detailed in the vacancy table above. Candidates must be able to produce proof of this experience at the time of the interview.

selection_process: Selection for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026 will be based on a personal interview. Candidates must report to Station HQ Jammu on their scheduled date among 20
Selected candidates will be required to undergo 10 days of On the Job Training (OJT) and obtain a certificate from the Officer-in-Charge (OIC)
before signing the contract. The OJT period will remain unpaid and is a mandatory requirement before the candidate is assigned charge as a contractual employee.
how_to_apply: Visit the official ECHS website at www.echs.gov.in and download the application format for this recruitment.
Fill in the application form as per the requisite format given on the website.
Attach self-attested photocopies of educational qualification certificates, work experience certificates, medical certificate signed by SEMO/CMO, and character certificate/police verification.
Place the completed application, along with the documents, in a sealed envelope.
Drop the sealed envelope in the Tender Box placed at the ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate before 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs), in duplicate.
Wait for the interview call and appear at Station HQ Jammu on the scheduled date with all original documents.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted in duplicate in a sealed envelope and dropped in the Tender Box at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate. Applications received after 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs) will not be accepted. Candidates must bring all original certificates, mark sheets, discharge book, PPO, and two passport-size colour photographs at the time of interview. No TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance) will be admissible for attending the interview. Only candidates meeting the qualitative requirements may apply. Preference will be given to Ex-servicemen. Vacancies may change as per the official notice. For terms and conditions, application form, and remuneration details, candidates should refer to the official website www.echs.gov.in. For additional details, candidates may contact Station HQ (ECHS Cell) Jammu at mobile number 8899053743 or email [email protected].

rows.details: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Jammu
Ministry of Defence, Government of India

Medical Specialist, Gynaecologist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Dental A/T/H, Lab Technician, Physiotherapist, Pharmacist, Peon, Driver, Female Attendant, Safaiwala, IT Networking Technician, Data Entry Operator, Clerk
Contractual, up to 31 March 2027, renewable for an additional period of one year till attaining the maximum age, subject to performance
Offline (application to be dropped in sealed Tender Box at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate)

content_sections.heading: ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Last date to submit application: 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs). Applications received after this date and time will not be accepted. Interview dates: 20, 21 and 22 August 2026 at Station HQ Jammu, starting at 0830 hrs. Reporting time for interview: Candidates must reach between 0845 hrs and 1400 hrs on their scheduled day.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 27 vacancies are available across 15 posts at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu. The category-wise vacancy breakup, as per the official notice, is given below. Note: Vacancies may be changed as mentioned in the official notice.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must meet the minimum qualification and work experience requirements specified for each post. The maximum age for engagement is subject to performance of the candidate, as mentioned in the official notice. Preference will be given to Ex-servicemen. Minimum work experience ranges from 2 years to 5 years depending on the post, as detailed in the vacancy table above. Candidates must be able to produce proof of this experience at the time of the interview.

rows.minimum_qualification: Diploma Holder in Dental Hygiene/Class I DORA Course (Armed Forces)
B.Sc (Medical Lab Tech) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from a recognized board with Diploma in Medical Lab Tech from a recognized institution
B.Pharmacy from a recognised institute, OR (10+2) with Science stream and an approved Diploma in Pharmacy, registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacist Act 1948
Class 8th and Class 1 MT Driver (Armed Forces)
Diploma/Certificate or equivalent in IT Networking and Computer Application

content_sections.heading: ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026: Salary / Pay Scale
ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026 will be based on a personal interview. Candidates must report to Station HQ Jammu on their scheduled date among 20, 21, and 22 August 2026, between 0845 hrs and 1400 hrs. Selected candidates will be required to undergo 10 days of On the Job Training (OJT) and obtain a certificate from the Officer-in-Charge (OIC), ECHS Polyclinic Jammu, before signing the contract. The OJT period will remain unpaid and is a mandatory requirement before the candidate is assigned charge as a contractual employee.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates should keep the following documents ready: Application form as per the format given on the official ECHS website Self-attested photocopies of educational qualification certificates Self-attested photocopies of work experience certificates Medical certificate duly signed by SEMO/CMO Character certificate/Police verification Original certificates and mark sheets of 10th/Matric, 10+2, Graduation/Post Graduation/Diploma/course at the time of interview Original work experience proof and discharge book (for Ex-servicemen) PPO (Pension Payment Order) and two passport-size colour photographs

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ECHS Jammu Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official ECHS website at www.echs.gov.in and download the application format for this recruitment. Fill in the application form as per the requisite format given on the website. Attach self-attested photocopies of educational qualification certificates, work experience certificates, medical certificate signed by SEMO/CMO, and character certificate/police verification. Place the completed application, along with the documents, in a sealed envelope. Drop the sealed envelope in the Tender Box placed at the ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate before 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs), in duplicate. Wait for the interview call and appear at Station HQ Jammu on the scheduled date with all original documents.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted in duplicate in a sealed envelope and dropped in the Tender Box at ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate. Applications received after 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs) will not be accepted. Candidates must bring all original certificates, mark sheets, discharge book, PPO, and two passport-size colour photographs at the time of interview. No TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance) will be admissible for attending the interview. Only candidates meeting the qualitative requirements may apply. Preference will be given to Ex-servicemen. Vacancies may change as per the official notice. For terms and conditions, application form, and remuneration details, candidates should refer to the official website www.echs.gov.in. For additional details, candidates may contact Station HQ (ECHS Cell) Jammu at mobile number 8899053743 or email [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 11 August 2026 (1100 hrs).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 21 vacancies across 15 posts, including Medical Specialist, Gynaecologist, Medical Officer, Dental Officer, Pharmacist, Physiotherapist, Lab Technician, IT Networking Technician, Data Entry Operator, Clerk, Driver, Peon, Female Attendant, and Safaiwala.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application is offline. Candidates must submit the sealed envelope with the application in duplicate in the Tender Box placed at the ECHS Polyclinic Jammu gate.

faq.question: Q4. When is the interview for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interviews will be held on 20, 21, and 22 August 2026 at Station HQ Jammu, starting at 0830 hrs. Candidates must report between 0845 hrs and 1400 hrs.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026 posts?
faq.answer: The fixed monthly remuneration ranges from Rs 21,800/- for posts like Peon, Female Attendant, and Safaiwala to Rs 1,30,000/- for Medical Specialist and Gynaecologist posts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notice does not mention any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. Who is eligible to apply for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates meeting the minimum educational qualification and work experience mentioned against each post are eligible to apply. Preference is given to Ex-servicemen.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the contract for ECHS Jammu recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The engagement is on a contractual basis up to 31 March 2027, renewable for an additional period of one year until the candidate attains the maximum age, subject to performance.
